value: v1.11.0 quality release. Tracked via GitHub milestone v1.11.0 (https://github.com/seabearDEV/codexCLI/milestone/1). Scope: (1) DONE — Tier 1 doc fixes from PR #58 review, merged in 3077055; (2) OPEN — withFileLock fail-closed in production with CODEX_DISABLE_LOCKING=1 opt-out for tests + lockless-fallback test coverage + defensive shallow-cache audit (#61); (3) OPEN — Short-flag namespace audit, rip-and-replace, single CHANGELOG entry (#62); (4) DONE — CODEX_DATA_DIR polish (#63, PR #64 merged 2026-04-08, commit 74c1508). README env-var section, absolute-path validation, ccli info provenance annotation, clearDataDirectoryCache() export, W_OK|X_OK writability check (Copilot review fix). Sequencing: PR2 = short-flags next (smallest remaining), PR3 = withFileLock+cache sweep last. Out of scope: hand-edit drift detection (defer to v1.12+), any new features.
